summary: Comprehensive testing of FoodHub food delivery application completed successfully. All backend APIs working (23/23 tests passed). Frontend features tested extensively including new sticky cart bar, comprehensive cart page, owner dashboard with sidebar navigation, reviews sections, and mobile responsiveness. All major features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check and all 23 endpoints
Home page loads correctly and is responsive on mobile/desktop
Restaurant detail page shows menu items and sticky 'View Cart' bar when items added
Restaurant detail page shows reviews section at bottom

Cart page shows all sections: items, add more items button, restaurant notes, suggested items, apply coupon (WELCOME50/FOOD100), delivery time, delivery details, payment method, order summary, place order
Apply coupon WELCOME50 works and shows 10% discount up to ₹50
Cart page 'Add more items' button navigates back to restaurant
Owner dashboard has sidebar navigation (Overview, Orders, Menu, Restaurants)
Owner dashboard does NOT show public restaurant listings or ordering UI - confirmed management panel only
Owner dashboard Overview tab shows stats (pending: 2, active: 0, delivered: 0, revenue: ₹0)
Admin dashboard loads correctly with stats (7 users, 2 restaurants, 2 orders, ₹0 revenue)
Login flows for all 3 roles work correctly (admin, customer, owner)
Mobile responsiveness on all pages (390x844 mobile, 768x1024 tablet)
Sticky cart bar functionality working correctly
Delivery details form validation and input
Payment method selection (Cash on Delivery and Online)

success_percentage.frontend: 98% (all major features working, minor limitation on rate & review testing due to no delivered orders)

action_item_for_main_agent: No critical issues found. Minor note: Rate & Review functionality on orders page couldn't be fully tested as all orders are in 'Placed' status - need delivered orders to test the review dialog, but the UI structure is correctly implemented.
